description: Pushed PDF to reMarkable root directory instead of /Meetings folder. This is the second time in the same session — first with convergence-ai-prep.pdf, now with kathy-kim-prep.pdf. David has to manually reorganize files on the reMarkable.
correction: Always use 'rmapi put <file> /Meetings' to target the Meetings folder on reMarkable. Never push to root.
systemic_fix: Rule: All meeting prep PDFs pushed to reMarkable go to /Meetings folder. Use 'rmapi mkdir /Meetings' if folder doesn't exist, then 'rmapi put <file> /Meetings'.
